name: Test Room 0
devNote: In the randomizer, we don't include door unlocks in the LocalState.
Therefore it can't generally remember a door that was just unlocked
(only if there is a round-trip path that collects it first).
Because of this, in order to make door unlocks work,
we handle a door unlock in combination with leaving through the door.
In particular, an implicit leaveNormally only applies to strats with an unlocksDoors.
